name: Hot Fudge Sauce (Ceideburg)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the cocoa powder and butter in a saucepan over low heat until everything blends together.
2. Stir in the boiling water.
3. Add sugar, corn syrup, vanilla (or rum), and bring to a boil for about 8 minutes if desired a hot sauce that will harden on ice cream. If you prefer an ordinary sauce, boil it for 5 minutes.
4. Let cool before serving.
Makes 1 cup.
